content.en:
"The effect of the Wind Source Gold Liquid is too good, no wonder those Supreme Beings are so crazy about snatching the Wind Source Gold Crystal!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

Of course, he was actually only one step away from breaking through, and the Wind Source Golden Liquid only played a role as an introduction, which could help him break the shackles at once and raise the Endless Eternal Body to the Xiaocheng realm.

However, it is a little difficult to raise the Endless Eternal Body to the Dacheng realm, and I am afraid that refining these wind source gold liquids may not be successful.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian continued to refine the Wind Source Gold Liquid, and drop by drop of the Wind Source Gold Liquid was refined by him, enhancing the growth of the Endless Eternal Body.

Gradually, Ye Tian's Endless Eternal Body became stronger and stronger.

The early stage of Xiaocheng!

Medium-term!

Xiaocheng late!

Xiaocheng peak!

Just when the Wind Source Golden Liquid was completely exhausted, Ye Tian's Endless Eternal Body finally broke the shackles of Xiaocheng to Dacheng realm and was promoted to Dacheng realm.

Rumble!!!!

The Endless Eternal Body of the Dacheng Realm is much more powerful than the Endless Eternal Body at the peak of the entry.

At this moment, Ye Tian felt the power of the Endless Eternal Body of the Dacheng Realm.

If you let the copy body urge that Eternal Realm powerful finger and exert a full blow comparable to that of the Eightfold Supreme One, there will be no too serious injury, and even if you urge that Eternal Realm powerful finger with all your strength and exert the power of the Ninefold Supreme One's blow, the injury will not be too serious.

If you are desperate, you can copy your body and use the attack power of the Nine Beings twice.

Moreover, his regular combat power has probably also been improved to the top combat power of the Fivefold Supreme, and he is not very far from the Sixfold Supreme.

Once he breaks through to the realm of the Triple Supreme, I am afraid that he will really have the top combat power of the Sixfold Supreme.

After the Endless Eternal Body has been promoted to the Dacheng realm, it will be very difficult to continue to improve.

After all, his Endless Eternal Body surpassed the Superior Eternal Body and reached the level of the Legendary Eternal Body, which was extremely powerful, but it was also extremely difficult to ascend.

However, even if it is only a Infinite Eternal Body of the Great Completion Level, it is comparable to the Upper Eternal Body of the Ordinary Perfection Realm.

"It's time to storm the Triple Supreme Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He took out the Mizusawa cold leaf and the other side of the three-flower fruit, as well as several other auxiliary resources, and then swallowed them and began to refine.

"Broken!"

Ye Tian let out a low shout, and the shackles between the Dual Supreme Realm and the Triple Supreme Realm were strongly broken by Ye Tian, and an even more powerful aura spread out from Ye Tian's body.

At this moment, he broke the shackles and was promoted to the realm of the Triple Supreme.

"The breakthrough was easy!"

Ye Tian said.

But this is also very normal, after all, his understanding of the eternal rules is too deep, and there are Mizusawa cold leaves and the three flowers on the other side as breakthrough aids, if he can't easily break through, it would be strange!

Ye Tian spent some more years stabilizing the realm of the Triple Supreme One, and then began to inquire about the situation of Feng Guhe.

If the situation of the Wind Ancient River did not change much, he was ready to enter the Wind Ancient River again.

If he kills more Eternal Tribulation Clans, he can get more resources from the Wind Ancient Source Ancestor, and if he is lucky, he may even be able to touch the Wind Source Golden Crystal, then he will make a lot of money.

Now, the Eternal Tribulation Clan's Eternal Tribulation Crystal is not working well on him, he has also refined some before, but unfortunately there is no improvement, but the Wind Source Golden Crystal still has an effect.

If he had enough Wind Source Gold Liquid, he would probably be able to raise the Endless Eternal Body to the Perfection Realm.

Therefore, he also wanted to get more Wind Source Golden Crystals.

......

Genjin Pavilion.

Ye Tian entered here, after all, this time it was the Battle of the Wind Ancient River organized by the Wind Ancient Source Ancestor, so he could only find out the latest news in the Source God Pavilion.

After communicating with a supreme person, Ye Tian roughly knew the situation.

After knowing that the Wind Ancient River possessed the Wind Source Golden Crystal, a large number of supreme beings poured into the Wind Ancient River.

The Eternal Tribulation Clan suffered heavy losses, but so did the Supreme Ones, and many powerful and famous Supreme Beings fell to the Wind Ancient River.

Moreover, a half-step Eternal Realm disciple died in the Wind Ancient River.

For the Eternal Tribulation Clan to be so obsessed with competing for the Wind Ancient River, Ye Tian felt very strange.

Although the strength of the Eternal Tribulation Clan is very strong, it can't withstand this kind of struggle!

The Eternal Tribulation Clan has only one Supreme Eternal Tribulation Domain, and it is also targeted by many forces, this time in order to occupy the Fenggu River, the Eternal Tribulation Clan continues to mobilize the Eternal Tribulation Clan from the Supreme Eternal Tribulation Domain, and has lost a lot of Eternal Tribulation Clan.

If the losses continue, even if the Eternal Tribulation Clan really occupies the Fenggu River, they won't be able to get back to their roots, right?

Even if the value of the Wind Source Golden Crystal is high, it can't make up for the loss of a large number of clansmen.

Therefore, Ye Tian didn't understand it very much.

"Maybe the Eternal Tribulation has a bigger plan!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

This time, he was going not to carry that Eternal Realm powerhouse finger first.

Although his strength could not compete with those Sixfold Realm Eternal Tribulation Clans comparable to the Void Divine Son, his life-saving ability was strong!

Star Ancestor can save his life in front of the top half-step Eternal Realm by relying on the Ancient Star Eternal Body, and his Endless Eternal Body is even more powerful than the Ancient Star Eternal Body in terms of life protection, the Sixfold Realm Eternal Tribulation Clan can't kill him at all, and even some Sevenfold Realm Eternal Tribulation Clans can't kill him.

Therefore, even if he didn't carry the Eternal Realm Mighty Finger, it would be enough to save his life.

Wow!

Ye Tian quickly rushed to the Fenggu River again, and immediately entered the Fenggu River, ready to investigate the situation.

-------------------

Deep in the Genjin Pavilion.

The Twelve Ancestors are in a meeting.

"Wind Ancient Origin Ancestor, you are a special life of the Source Sea, the Wind Ancient River used to be your birthplace, what is there there, it is worth the Eternal Tribulation Clan's great effort? As far as I know, the Eternal Tribulation Clan has lost hundreds of thousands of clans this time, and in order to transform the Wind Ancient River into the Eternal Tribulation Domain, the resources mobilized are even more numerous, if it is just for those unknown number of Wind Source Gold Crystal Veins, then I don't believe it. "

One of the Twelve Ancestors, the True River Sword Ancestor, said.

Feng Gu Yuan Ancestor shook his head and said, "I really don't know, although I was born in Feng Gu River, I haven't been back for endless years. In my original opinion, there are not many resources in the Wind Ancient River, only the Wind Source Crystal Sand is a good thing, and I don't even know when the Wind Source Golden Crystal was born in the Wind Ancient River. As far as I know, the Wind Source Golden Crystal should have only been born for a short time, otherwise I wouldn't have been able to get the news. As for why the Eternal Tribulation Ancestor seized the Wind Ancient River, I have a guess in my heart. "

"What speculation?"

Zhenhe Sword Ancestor and the others were curious one by one.
